backlog_item: 2.1.3: ADHD Engine client signal (port 5448 query, energy/attention extraction, graceful fallback)

changes: replaced direct service-internal imports with HTTP API probing
added ADHD Engine endpoint probing for /api/v1/energy-level/{user_id} and /api/v1/attention-state/{user_id}
implemented base URL priority including localhost:5448 first, then fallback
graceful degradation to no ADHD signal when service is unavailable
supporting_fixes: removed brittle profile_detector dependency on missing symbol by using ProfileManager().profiles_dir
